description: One row per account-month in monthly card snapshot.
One bureau proxy row per account-month.
Utilization should be in a plausible range.
Payment-to-balance ratio should be within 0 to 1.
Delinquency bucket must be in approved set.
All account-month records should join to bureau proxy features.
All portfolio months should have macro scenario rows.
All snapshot records should join to account master.
CURRENT should not jump directly to CHARGEOFF in one month.
Latest month should contain active reporting population.
